body_excerpt: In ib_prctl_set of bugs.c, there is a possible way to re-enable indirect branch speculation due to a permissions bypass. This could lead to local information disclosure via a Spectre v2 attack with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
